scope: create exact payload files for segments 2 through 4
create BPB pack for those payloads
non_goals: do not claim the whole rebuild is coder-ready
do not implement segments 5 through 10 in this mission
success_criteria: all segment 2 through 4 artifact payload files exist
payload files are exact and machine-usable
failure_criteria: artifact payloads remain implied instead of checked in
required schemas are still only named rather than emitted
tradeoffs: upstream artifact concreteness first; downstream runtime packs later

escalation.rule: if any payload still requires interpretation, treat as BPB failure

evidence_inputs: segment definitions in zero-decision build spec
risk_register: some fields may tighten after determinism testing
founder_decision_log: emit exact files for segments 2 through 4 now

change_control.rule: future missions may tighten fields but not revert to planning-only artifacts
